# krknctl — full entity details

> Auto-generated. Source of truth for the krknctl CLI surface.

## scenario: attach
scenario_type: cli_command
description: connects krknctl to the running scenario logs

(no documented flags)

## scenario: clean
scenario_type: cli_command
description: cleans already run scenario files and containers

(no documented flags)

## scenario: describe
scenario_type: cli_command
description: describes a scenario

(no documented flags)

## scenario: graph
scenario_type: cli_command
description: runs or scaffolds a dependency graph based run

(no documented flags)

## scenario: graph_run
scenario_type: cli_command
description: runs graph based run

### parameters

| name | variable | type | default | required | description |
| ---- | -------- | ---- | ------- | -------- | ----------- |
| alerts-profile | ALERTS_PROFILE | string |  | false | custom alerts profile file path |
| exit-on-error | EXIT_ON_ERROR | bool |  | false | if set this flag will the workflow will be interrupted and the tool will exit with a status greater than 0 |
| kubeconfig | KUBECONFIG | string |  | false | kubeconfig path (if not set will default to ~/.kube/config) |
| metrics-profile | METRICS_PROFILE | string |  | false | custom metrics profile file path |

## scenario: graph_scaffold
scenario_type: cli_command
description: Scaffolds a dependency graph based run

### parameters

| name | variable | type | default | required | description |
| ---- | -------- | ---- | ------- | -------- | ----------- |
| global-env | GLOBAL_ENV | bool |  | false | if set this flag will add global environment variables to each scenario in the graph |

## scenario: list
scenario_type: cli_command
description: lists available scenarios and running scenarios

(no documented flags)

## scenario: list_available
scenario_type: cli_command
description: list available krkn-hub scenarios

(no documented flags)

## scenario: list_running
scenario_type: cli_command
description: list running krkn-hub scenarios

(no documented flags)

## scenario: query-status
scenario_type: cli_command
description: checks the status of a container or a list of containers by container name or container ID

### parameters

| name | variable | type | default | required | description |
| ---- | -------- | ---- | ------- | -------- | ----------- |
| graph | GRAPH | string |  | false | to query the exit status of a previously run graph file |

## scenario: random
scenario_type: cli_command
description: runs or scaffolds a random chaos run based on a json test plan

(no documented flags)

## scenario: random_run
scenario_type: cli_command
description: runs a random run based on a json test plan

### parameters

| name | variable | type | default | required | description |
| ---- | -------- | ---- | ------- | -------- | ----------- |
| alerts-profile | ALERTS_PROFILE | string |  | false | custom alerts profile file path |
| exit-on-error | EXIT_ON_ERROR | bool |  | false | if set this flag will the workflow will be interrupted and the tool will exit with a status greater than 0 |
| graph-dump | GRAPH_DUMP | string |  | false | specifies the name of the file where the randomly generated dependency graph will be persisted |
| kubeconfig | KUBECONFIG | string |  | false | kubeconfig path (if not set will default to ~/.kube/config) |
| max-parallel | MAX_PARALLEL | int |  | false | maximum number of parallel scenarios |
| metrics-profile | METRICS_PROFILE | string |  | false | custom metrics profile file path |
| number-of-scenarios | NUMBER_OF_SCENARIOS | int |  | false | allows you to specify the number of elements to select from the execution plan |

## scenario: random_scaffold
scenario_type: cli_command
description: scaffolds a random run based on a json test plan

### parameters

| name | variable | type | default | required | description |
| ---- | -------- | ---- | ------- | -------- | ----------- |
| global-env | GLOBAL_ENV | bool |  | false | if set this flag will add global environment variables to each scenario in the graph |
| number-of-scenarios | NUMBER_OF_SCENARIOS | int |  | false | the number of scenarios that will be created from the template file |
| seed-file | SEED_FILE | string |  | false | template file with already configured scenarios used to generate the random test plan |

## scenario: run
scenario_type: cli_command
description: krknctl run [flags]

### parameters

| name | variable | type | default | required | description |
| ---- | -------- | ---- | ------- | -------- | ----------- |
| alerts-profile | ALERTS_PROFILE | string |  | false | custom alerts profile file path |
| detached | DETACHED | bool |  | false | if set this flag will run in detached mode |
| kubeconfig | KUBECONFIG | string |  | false | kubeconfig path (if not set will default to ~/.kube/config) |
| metrics-profile | METRICS_PROFILE | string |  | false | custom metrics profile file path |

## scenario: visualize
scenario_type: cli_command
description: deploys krkn-visualize (Grafana dashboard) with Elasticsearch and optional Prometheus datasources to the current Kubernetes cluster

### parameters

| name | variable | type | default | required | description |
| ---- | -------- | ---- | ------- | -------- | ----------- |
| delete | DELETE | bool |  | false | delete an existing krkn-visualize deployment |
| es-password | ES_PASSWORD | string |  | false | Elasticsearch password |
| es-url | ES_URL | string |  | false | Elasticsearch URL |
| es-username | ES_USERNAME | string |  | false | Elasticsearch username |
| grafana-password | GRAFANA_PASSWORD | string |  | false | Grafana admin password (required unless --delete is set) |
| kubeconfig | KUBECONFIG | string |  | false | kubeconfig path (defaults to ~/.kube/config) |
| kubectl | KUBECTL | string |  | false | kubectl command to use (e.g. oc for OpenShift) (default "kubectl") |
| namespace | NAMESPACE | string |  | false | Kubernetes namespace to deploy into (default "krkn-visualize") |
| prometheus-bearer-token | PROMETHEUS_BEARER_TOKEN | string |  | false | Prometheus bearer token for authentication (optional) |
| prometheus-url | PROMETHEUS_URL | string |  | false | Prometheus URL for datasource (optional) |
